channel.title: Tools on Vineel Kovvuri
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on Vineel Kovvuri

item.title: 🌍 World Clocks
item.description:
Features
• Analog clocks with day/night themes (sun/moon indicators)
• Digital time display with date below each clock
• Search and add any IANA timezone by city name
• Remove user-added clocks (default clocks are fixed)
• Default clocks: PST, CST, EST, IST, SGT
• Real-time updates every second

item.title: 🍅 Pomodoro Timer
item.description:
25:00
Pomodoro
0 / 20 sessions
Today's Tasks
  • No tasks planned yet.
Completed Tasks
  • No tasks completed yet. Start a Pomodoro!
How it works
• Pomodoro — 25-minute focused work session
• Short Break — 5-minute break between sessions
• Long Break — 15-minute break after several sessions

Features
• Circular progress ring with countdown timer
• Type a task name before starting to track what you worked on
• Session dots track up to 20 completed pomodoros
• Completed tasks logged with start/end times
• Bell sound notification when a session ends
• Timer shows in the browser tab title while running
• Tasks and session count persist across page reloads
• Today's Tasks — plan your day by adding tasks, mark them completed or delete them
• Click ▶ on a daily task to load it into the timer
• Pomodoro sessions are automatically counted per daily task
• Download Report — export a text summary of tasks and pomodoro counts for weekly status

item.title: 🎨 Whiteboard
item.description:
Features
• Pen tool with 5 color options (Black, Red, Blue, Green, Orange)
• Eraser tool to remove strokes
• Infinite canvas with pan support (Hand tool or middle-mouse button)
• Touch-screen support for drawing
• Canvas auto-resizes to fill the viewport

item.title: 📄 Diff Tool
item.description:
Features
• Side-by-side diff view powered by Monaco Editor
• Toggle inline diff mode for a single-column view
• Both panels are editable — paste or type text directly
• Whitespace-aware diffing (toggle to include whitespace changes)
• Invisible character rendering (spaces, tabs, line endings)
• Word wrap toggle

item.title: 📋 Page Table Calculator
item.description:
Start Address 0x0000000000000000
End Address 0x0000000000000FFF
Page Table Requirements
Entries
PML5-
PML4-
PDP-
PD-
PT-
Tables
PML5-
PML4-
PDP-
PD-
PT-
Memory being mapped:
Page tables required:
Memory for page tables:
x64 5-Level Paging Diagram 
     63           57 56           48 47           39 38           30 29            21 20            12 11               0
     +──────────────+───────────────+───────────────+───────────────+────────────────+────────────────+──────────────────+
     | Sign         |  PML5E        | PML4E         |Page Directory | Page           | Page           |Physical          |
     | Extend       |  Offset       | Offset        |Pointer        | Directory      | Table          |Page              |
     |              |               |               |Offset         | Offset         | Offset         |Offset            |
     +──────────────+─+─────────────+─+─────────────+──+────────────+───+────────────+───+────────────+───+──────────────+
                      |9              |9               |9               |9               |9               |12
                      |               |                |                |                |                |
                      |  +─────+      |  +─────+       |  +─────+       |  +─────+       |  +─────+       |  +─────+
                      |  |     |      |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |
                      |  |     |      |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |
                      |  |     |      |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |
                      |  |     |      |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |       |  |     |
                      |  +─────+      |  +─────+       |  +─────+       |  +─────+       |  +─────+       |  +─────+
                      +->|PML5E+---+  +->|PML4E|---+   +->|PDPE |---+   +->|PDE  |---+   +->|PTE  |---+   +->| PA  |
                         +─────+   |52   +─────+   |52    +─────+   |52    +─────+   |52    +─────+   |52    +─────+
                         |     |   |     |     |   |      |     |   |      |     |   |      |     |   |      |     |
                  +----->+─────+   +---->+─────+   +----->+─────+   +----->+─────+   +----->+─────+   +----->+─────+
                  |        4K              4K               4K               4K                4K               4K
                  |
                  |
                  |
                  |
63         52  51 |                               12 11            0
+─────────────+───+─────────────────────────────────+───────────────+
|             |    Page-Map Level-4 or Level-5      |               |
|    MBZ      |          Table Base Address         |               |  CR3
|             |                                     |               |
+─────────────+─────────────────────────────────────+───────────────+
Size Reference Table 
1B      2^0    0x1
2B      2^1    0x2
4B      2^2    0x4
8B      2^3    0x8
16B     2^4    0x10
32B     2^5    0x20
64B     2^6    0x40
128B    2^7    0x80
256B    2^8    0x100
512B    2^9    0x200
1KB     2^10   0x400
2KB     2^11   0x800
4KB     2^12   0x1000
8KB     2^13   0x2000
16KB    2^14   0x4000
32KB    2^15   0x8000
64KB    2^16   0x10000
128KB   2^17   0x20000
256KB   2^18   0x40000
512KB   2^19   0x80000
1MB     2^20   0x100000
2MB     2^21   0x200000
4MB     2^22   0x400000
8MB     2^23   0x800000
16MB    2^24   0x1000000
32MB    2^25   0x2000000
64MB    2^26   0x4000000
128MB   2^27   0x8000000
256MB   2^28   0x10000000
512MB   2^29   0x20000000
1GB     2^30   0x40000000
2GB     2^31   0x80000000
4GB     2^32   0x100000000
8GB     2^33   0x200000000
16GB    2^34   0x400000000
32GB    2^35   0x800000000
64GB    2^36   0x1000000000
128GB   2^37   0x2000000000
256GB   2^38   0x4000000000
512GB   2^39   0x8000000000
1TB     2^40   0x10000000000
2TB     2^41   0x20000000000
4TB     2^42   0x40000000000
8TB     2^43   0x80000000000
16TB    2^44   0x100000000000
32TB    2^45   0x200000000000
64TB    2^46   0x400000000000
128TB   2^47   0x800000000000
256TB   2^48   0x1000000000000
512TB   2^49   0x2000000000000
1PB     2^50   0x4000000000000
2PB     2^51   0x8000000000000
4PB     2^52   0x10000000000000
8PB     2^53   0x20000000000000
16PB    2^54   0x40000000000000
32PB    2^55   0x80000000000000
64PB    2^56   0x100000000000000
128PB   2^57   0x200000000000000
256PB   2^58   0x400000000000000
512PB   2^59   0x800000000000000
Features
• Enter a From address and Size to calculate the end address and page table requirements
• Quick size selector with quantity and unit dropdowns (Bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB)
• Bit-level address visualization with color-coded segments (Sign Ext, PML5, PML4, PDP, PD, PT, Offset)
• Click individual bits to toggle them and update the address
• Per-segment hex and decimal values displayed below each segment
• Page table entries and tables calculated for each level (PML5 through PT)
• Summary of total tables needed and memory consumed by page tables
• Collapsible x64 5-Level Paging Diagram reference
• Collapsible Size Reference Table (bytes through petabytes)

item.title: 🔀 PE Rebase
item.description:
📄
Drop a PE file here or click to browse
.exe, .dll, .sys, .efi, .ocx, .scr, .drv
ImageBase
Current ImageBase
New ImageBase Enter a hex address (e.g. 0x10000)
Section Headers (read-only)
Name VirtualSize VirtualAddress RawSize RawOffset Characteristics
Features
• Load a PE file (.exe, .dll, .sys, .efi) via drag-and-drop or file picker
• Displays current ImageBase with file offset and field size
• Supports both PE32 (4-byte ImageBase) and PE32+ (8-byte ImageBase) formats
• Enter a new hex address (e.g. 0x10000 or 0x00007FF700000000) to rebase
• Section headers displayed for reference
• Downloads the modified PE file — no data leaves your browser

item.title: 🔍 Multi-Search Highlighter
item.description:
Features
• Ctrl+Click any word to highlight all its occurrences in a unique color
• Select text first, then Ctrl+Click to highlight multi-word phrases
• Ctrl+Click a highlighted word again to remove its highlight
• Click a color chip in the status bar to remove that highlight
• 17 distinct highlight colors, auto-assigned
• Highlights update automatically as you edit the text
• Overview ruler shows highlight positions in the scrollbar

item.title: 🔢 Hex Editor
item.description:
Drop file(s) here or click to browse...
Drop file(s) here
Drop a file above to view its hex dump.

Features
• Open multiple files in tabs
• Drag & drop files anywhere on this view or use the drop zone above
• Virtual-scrolling hex view with offset, hex bytes, and ASCII columns
• Click a byte to select it; click-and-drag to select a range
• Inline byte editing — type hex digits to overwrite (modified bytes shown in red)
• Goto offset, Find (hex bytes or ASCII text), Find & Replace
• Undo / Redo for all edits
• Save modified file locally

Keyboard Shortcuts
• Ctrl+G — Goto offset
• Ctrl+F — Find
• Ctrl+H — Replace
• Ctrl+S — Save file
• Ctrl+Z — Undo
• Ctrl+Y — Redo
• Ctrl+[ / Ctrl+] — Previous / next tab
• Arrow keys — Navigate bytes
• Tab / Shift+Tab — Next / previous byte
• Escape — Exit editing mode
Copy

item.title: 🔣 Calculator
item.description:
🔣
Calculator
+
0
Features
• Windows 7 Programmer Calculator look and feel
• Hex, Dec, Oct, Bin radix modes with live conversion
• Multi-base readout — always shows value in all four bases simultaneously
• Bitwise operations: And, Or, Xor, Not, Lsh, Rsh
• Rotate operations: RoL, RoR
• Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, Mod, ±
• Interactive 64-bit binary display — click bits to toggle them
• Hex digit buttons A–F auto-enable/disable based on radix
• Full keyboard support — type digits and operators directly
• Ctrl+C to copy the displayed value, Ctrl+V to paste a number
• Click + in the title bar to spawn additional independent calculators

item.title: 🔬 UEFI Log Explorer
item.description:
Drop file here or click to browse...
Drop CSV file here or click to browse...

item.title: 🛠️ ELF Editor
item.description:
Drop ELF file here or click to browse...

    ELF Editor

    Load an ELF file (.elf, .so, .o, .ko, .out) to explore its structure.

item.title: 🛠️ PE Editor
item.description:
Drop PE file here or click to browse...

    PE Editor

    Load a PE file (.exe, .dll, .sys, .efi) to explore its structure.

item.title: 🧮 Hex to Memory Offsets
item.description:
Hexadecimal to Memory Offsets

Examples:
  0x100000000                  Hex value
  0xFFFF FFFF FFFF FFFF        Hex with spaces
  0x1000_0000                  Hex with underscores
  0xFFFE8000 + 0x00018000      Addition of hex values
  0x100000000 - 0x1000         Subtraction of hex values
  0xFEC00000 + 64K + 2MB       Mix of hex and size units
  4GB - 16KB                   Subtraction with size units
  4GB                          Size unit alone
  64K, 2M, 1G, 3T, 512B        Short suffixes
  64KB, 2MB, 1GB, 3TB          Long suffixes
  4K * 8 * 32 * 256             Multiplication
  0x1000 * 4 + 2MB              Mixed multiply and add
Features
• Parse hex values with 0x prefix, spaces, and underscores (e.g. 0xFFFF_FFFF)
• Arithmetic expressions with + and - operators (e.g. 0xFEC00000 + 0x18000)
• Size unit support: B, KB, MB, GB, TB and short forms K, M, G, T
• Mix hex values and size units in expressions (e.g. 4GB - 16KB)
• Multiplication with * operator (e.g. 4K * 8 * 32)
• Size breakdown into TB, GB, MB, KB, and Bytes
• Distance to next power of 2
• Signed interpretation for 8, 16, 32, and 64-bit widths
• Multiple calculator sections — click + to add more
